title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Lavandula angustifolia essential oils contains linalool and linalyl acetate as its major bioactive constituents. These compounds have expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve cough symptoms by thinning mucus and reducing inflammation in the respiratory tract. Linalool in particular has been shown to have a calming effect on the respiratory system, reducing spasms and irritation that can exacerbate coughing.
